functions.name: music_cue.utils.xlref
documentation:
openpyxl helper to generate Excel cell references.

Args:
    row (int): Row index (zero-indexed or one-indexed based on zero_indexed).
    column (int): Column index (zero-indexed or one-indexed based on zero_indexed).
    zero_indexed (bool, optional): Whether the row and column indices are zero-indexed.
                                  Defaults to True.

Returns:
    str: Excel cell reference (e.g., "A1", "B2").

functions.name: music_cue.utils.custom_layout_sheet
documentation:
Openpyxl helper to apply a custom layout to a worksheet.

This function:
    - Freezes the first row.
    - Adds a filter to the entire sheet.
    - Auto-sizes columns based on cell content.
    - Makes the first row bold.

functions.name: music_cue.utils.read_excel_tab
documentation:
Reads data from an Excel sheet and returns a list of data class objects.

Args:
    wb (openpyxl.Workbook): The Excel workbook object.
    sheet_name (str): The name of the sheet to read.
    fields (list): A list of tuples, where the first element of each tuple is the
                  column name in the sheet and the second element is the
                  corresponding attribute name for the data class.

Returns:
    list: A list of data class objects containing the extracted data.

functions.name: music_cue.data_handler.main
documentation: Used for testing

classes.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.read_db_sheet
documentation: Returns DB sheet as list of data class objects

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.read_source_sheet
documentation:
Returns original Excel data source as list of dataclass objects
Sheet must be cleaned before running the APP. This means that
in the column "SESSION NAME" the session names must be populated.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.get_duration_data_per_episode_per_clip
documentation:
Returns dict with duration data per Episode per clip.
If clip is used more than 1 time in Episode then
duration of individual clips are added.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.update_artist_title_info
documentation: For a given clip name, artist and title entries in the DB sheet are updated.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.create_episode_tabs
documentation:
Per Episode a report is produced which shows how long clips have been used
and which artist and title belongs to the clips.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.create_or_update_db_sheet
documentation:
Creates or updates dB sheet given the original data sheet. This sheet is used as
dB table for the App.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.create_clip_usage_per_episode_sheet
documentation: Generates a sheet which provides information what clip is used in what Episode

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.split_mp4_file
documentation:
Given the original MP4 file of an episode, this file can be split into
separate files given the start and end time of a given event.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.get_clip_name_from_raw_clip_name
documentation: Helper function which strips the file format (.mp3, mp4, etc.) from a "raw" clip name.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.get_clip_name_from_event
documentation: Returns clip name from given event.

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.convert_time_to_ms
documentation: Returns time in milliseconds given time string

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.get_episode_names
documentation: Returns list of Episode names

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.get_events_per_episode_name
documentation: Returns list of Events given an Episode name

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.get_episode_index
documentation: Returns Episode index (eg. E01, E02, etc.) given the Episode name

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.get_artist_title_cache_from_clip_name
documentation: Returns artist and title information per clip name if present in dB sheet

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.open_excel_document
documentation: Opens Excel document given the absolute filename

methods.name: music_cue.data_handler.DataHandler.excel_save
documentation: Saves Excel file

This class provides CRUD functionality for the data entry APP to administer
clips being used in TV episodes. The collected data is used for copyright
purposes

Given an original Excel file with a source sheet, a dB sheet is generated and
per Episode a sheet is generated with information how long clips have been used
Also an extra sheet is present which shows what clips are present per episode.

Given the start and end dates of the clips, it is possible to split the episode
music file into separate music files for playback purposes.
